## Testing Checklist

- [ ] I have added unit tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have added integration tests for any new service interactions
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Test coverage remains at or above 80%
- [ ] I have tested edge cases and failure scenarios

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] I have updated docstrings for any modified public functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated the relevant ADR(s) in `docs/adrs/` if an architectural decision was made
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a summary of changes under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] API changes are reflected in the OpenAPI spec (run `make generate-openapi`)
